description: A receipt claiming token_handling.passthrough_detected = true. This is a security violation per MCP_MINIMUM_PROFILE MUST-9. Both verifiers must reject it. Python rejects it; TypeScript silently accepts it (as of 2026-04-03 audit).

expected_typescript.reason: MUST-9 violation. TS must reject this. As of audit date, TS has no token_handling check — this is the regression the test must catch.

conformance_requirement: A conforming verifier MUST return passed=false for any receipt where token_handling.passthrough_detected is true.
